name: Jewel - Swampy Roommate
description:

...Would it be wrong to call a smelly girl with a job a NEET just because she only creepy like you? Yes. Do I care? nuh uh :3

Also You guys can like... Request bots again. I am back, so do request bots.

Also Also I know that the bots have been slow so im sorry but I'll try to keep on posting from time to time. Just can't post much.
